blocks.text: DTC U0155: F-CAN communication error (PGM-FI ECU-combination meter control unit communication failure)

Inter-control unit communication (F-CAN) for powertrain/chassis systems uses two communication lines (F-CAN_H and F-CAN_L) to send and receive multiple signals simultaneously between multiple control units. If the PGM-FI ECU continues for more than a set time with no information sent from the combination meter by F-CAN, or if it continues for more than a set number of times with abnormal information sent from the combination meter, the PGM-FI ECU judges a failure and stores the DTC DTC.
Detection frequency, detection sequence, detection time required, detection method type, OBD status

rows.text: 24-hour (e.g. observation, operation (of a machine), care (of patient))
Detection order (of the DTC in question)
1D/C (single detection method), PGM-FI warning light: On
Normal judgment, failure judgment, not completed
Elapsed time after ignition ON mode
DTC requesting the prohibition of detection of the relevant DTC

blocks.text: If any of the following is established

items.text: When the PGM-FI ECU cannot receive signals from the combination meter sent using F-CAN_H and F-CAN_L for more than 1 second.
When the PGM-FI ECU continuously receives 20 or more abnormal signals from the combination meter sent using F-CAN_H and F-CAN_L.
Disconnection of F-CAN circuit code (F-CAN_H line)
Disconnection of F-CAN circuit code (F-CAN_L line)
Ground fault in F-CAN circuit code (F-CAN_H line)
Ground fault in F-CAN circuit code (F-CAN_L line)
Combination Meter failure (including blown or blown fuse)

blocks.text: If the vehicle is determined to be faulty, the PGM-FI warning light comes on and the temporary DTC, DTC and freeze data are stored in the PGM-FI ECU memory.

If the vehicle is diagnosed and determined to be normal after running consecutive 3D/C runs, the PGM-FI warning light will turn off. In addition, the PGM-FI warning light, temporary DTC, DTC and freeze data are cleared by using the clear command of the scan tool (including HDS) or by removing the 12V battery terminal.
